yaml:
steps:
  - id: extract_loan_application
    type: document_extraction
    depends_on: []
    config:
      document_path: case.data.documents.application_pdf
      schema: loan_application_pdf
      output_path: case.data.extraction.loan_application
  - id: classify_risk
    type: ai-component
    depends_on: [extract_loan_application]
    config:
      component: document_classification
      input_mapping:
        document_text: case.data.extraction.loan_application.text
      output_path: case.data.ai.risk
  - id: route_confidence
    type: rule
    depends_on: [classify_risk]
    outcomes:
      low_confidence: [human_review]
      high_confidence: [approval_notification]
    config:
      expression: case.data.ai.risk.confidence
      outcomes:
        - name: low_confidence
          condition: case.data.ai.risk.confidence < 0.80
          target: human_review
        - name: high_confidence
          condition: case.data.ai.risk.confidence >= 0.80
          target: approval_notification
  - id: human_review
    type: human-task
    depends_on: [route_confidence]
    config:
      assignee: underwriter
      form:
        fields:
          - key: review_notes
            label: Review notes
            type: textarea
            required: true
  - id: approval_notification
    type: notify
    depends_on: [route_confidence]
    config:
      channel: email
      message: Loan intake auto-approved
